rows.label: qev065201_MSG0003
rows.name: ...[ST:playername ] You came at the perfect time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0004
rows.name:
The analysis took some time, but it seems I
can finally obtain the information on my
sisters. With this, I can liberate everyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0005
rows.name:
Haha! Do you truly believe a
powerless Definia like you can
stop your mother's ambitions?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0006
rows.name: I am not alone. I have... [ST:playername ] with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Right? I'm sure you can manage
whatever traps Mother might have
set for us, can't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev065201_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod with confidence.

rows.label: qev065201_JNK0020
rows.name: Anxiety

rows.label: qev065201_SEL0021
rows.name: Frown and show a lack of confidence.

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0008
rows.name:
What can a mere Earthling do? That person
is nothing more than a single marionette
being manipulated by me, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0009
rows.name:
[ST:gender p1=He is p2=She is ] different from us Definians. To see that face so
full of confidence and will, and still not understand...
You really are a pitiable person, Mother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0010
rows.name:
You have made a rather unreliable
person your ally. Someone like this
is no match for my daughters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Even finding one's own path while feeling
lost is the strength of Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0012
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]... It's alright. I'm sure you won't lose
to us, who have no will of our own.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0013
rows.name: ...Alright, the analysis is complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0014
rows.name:
...What!? This is... Could it be that
Mother and just this many Definians
were controlling all of our sisters?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0015
rows.name:
If this is true, we can easily liberate
our sisters as long as we do something
about the three Definians at the base.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0016
rows.name:
Hahahahaha! There is no way someone like
that can defeat the three sisters![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0017
rows.name:
My three sisters are the supreme masterpieces
among all my daughters... If you get close,
you are the ones who will be killed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Say, [ST:playername ]. I believe this
will be my final request.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0019
rows.name:
Will you put an end to our Definian history
of conspiracies and conquests that has
continued since the distant ancient times?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Thank you. I thought
you would say that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0021
rows.name:
Well then, let's get the passcode
for the base from Mother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0022
rows.name:
With that, we should be able to infiltrate
the three sisters' stronghold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0028
rows.name:
It seems the block containing the passcode
has a strict protection placed on it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0029
rows.name:
I will try attempting the
analysis again, but could you
also try investigating Mother?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0030
rows.name:
Even if Mother disappears, as long
as the three sisters remain, everyone
cannot escape from her will...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0031
rows.name:
Please, head to their stronghold
on the Black Steel Continent and
put an end to everything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0032
rows.name:
I'm sorry... With my level of skill,
it doesn't seem like I will be able
to remove Mother's protection.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0033
rows.name:
If only there was someone with...
outstanding technical skills...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0034
rows.name:
Do you have anyone in mind?
Various aliens have gathered
in this NLA, haven't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0035
rows.name:
This man... is from the future? True, in
that case, there is a possibility he could
unlock Mother's protection, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0036
rows.name:
...Is that really true? I
find it hard to believe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0037
rows.name:
Even if we suppress Mother, as long
as the three sisters remain, our
sisters cannot escape from her will...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0038
rows.name:
Please, head to their stronghold
on the Black Steel Continent and
put an end to everything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0039
rows.name:
The voice that was constantly
being sent into my head has
completely stopped reaching me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0040
rows.name: ...It's all over, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev065201_SEL0031
rows.name:
Report that you have
defeated the three sisters.

rows.label: qev065201_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev065201_SEL0041
rows.name:
Say that there are still
Definian remnants left.

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0041
rows.name:
Thank goodness... With this, everyone
has been liberated from the madness
that Mother and the others created.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0042
rows.name:
We Definians are originally a species with a
weak sense of our own will... That is exactly
why we committed sins just as we were told.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0043
rows.name:
With those two heads crushed,
we will no longer be able to
commit evil deeds like before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0044
rows.name:
From now on, everyone will just blend into
their surroundings and live quietly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0045
rows.name:
Thank you for everything up
until now. For you to be so
kind to someone like me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0046
rows.name:
Please, accept this. It's the least
I can do to show my gratitude.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0047
rows.name:
Although my appearance will change, I will be
somewhere in this city. ...Let's meet again
somewhere. I'd hate for this to be the end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0048
rows.name:
The voice that was constantly
being sent into my head has
completely stopped reaching me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0049
rows.name: ...It's all over, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev065201_SEL0051
rows.name:
Report that you have
defeated the three sisters.

rows.label: qev065201_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev065201_SEL0061
rows.name:
Say that there are still
Definian remnants left.

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0050
rows.name:
Thank goodness... With this, everyone
has been liberated from the madness
that Mother and the others created.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0051
rows.name:
We Definians are originally a species with a
weak sense of our own will... That is exactly
why we committed sins just as we were told.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0052
rows.name:
With those two heads crushed,
we will no longer be able to
commit evil deeds like before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0053
rows.name:
From now on, everyone will just blend into
their surroundings and live quietly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0054
rows.name:
Thank you for everything up
until now. For you to be so
kind to someone like me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0055
rows.name:
Please, accept this. It's the least
I can do to show my gratitude.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0056
rows.name:
Although my appearance will change, I will be
somewhere in this city. ...Let's meet again
somewhere. I'd hate for this to be the end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0057
rows.name: Alright... Let's go, Mother![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0058
rows.name:
Ouch! You must not handle me so
roughly! I am the one who governs the
universe... Hey! What are you doing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0059
rows.name:
You're not a king anymore. You're
just a chatty sphere. I'll make sure
to teach you that... thoroughly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065201_MSG0060
rows.name:
Guh... This is a human rights violation!
What a ruthless woman you are. Good grief,
I would love to see your parents' faces...[ST:wait ]
